name: Fruit Ice Tea
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooled strong tea with fruit juice.
2. Add ice cubes.
3. Sweeten to taste using sugar or a sugar substitute.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE (3/8 cup per serving)
(A sweet option could have 2 to 3 servings per day.)
Source: The San Diego Union Food Section, May 26, 1994
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
